evidence: We make substantial investments in research and development... integrating emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence driven analytics and advanced robotics into our manufacturing processes where appropriate.
The development of our own artificial intelligence applications will require additional investment in the development of proprietary systems, models, or datasets, which are complex, costly.
In 2023, we acquired SparkAI Inc. (Spark AI) and Smart Apply, Inc. to accelerate the integration of smart technology innovation in our products.
We use automation software, digital tools, applications, and analytics on the S7 Series Combines and our See Spray targeted spraying solution.
Cameras, obstacle detection, radars, and machine learning have been applied to our CF Smart Detect tool to identify obstacles on jobsites.

This data is used to assist and support our customers operations and machines, and to enhance and develop our product offerings, including the development of machine learning, large language models and SaaS products.

Any confidential information that is disclosed to a third-party generative artificial intelligence platform could be leaked or disclosed to others, including sensitive information that is used to train the third parties model.

If the data used to train the solution or the content, analyses, or recommendations that the machine learning and intelligence applications assist in producing is deemed to be inaccurate, incomplete, biased or questionable, our brand and reputation may be harmed.

Technical or regulatory limitations may impact our ability to effectively implement automation, autonomy, and artificial intelligence solutions... compliance requirements regarding data privacy and artificial intelligence.

capex_mentions.quote: combined purchase price consideration for these acquisitions was $115, consisting of $101 cash, net of cash acquired, and $14 loan forgiven
capex_mentions.context: 2024 acquisitions assigned to PPA, SAT, and CF segments aimed at improving profitability, efficiency, and sustainability

capex_mentions.quote: combined cost of these acquisitions was $82, net of cash acquired of $2
capex_mentions.context: 2023 acquisitions of SparkAI Inc. and Smart Apply, Inc. to accelerate smart technology innovation

limitations: No aggregate AI-specific R&D or capex dollar amounts disclosed in excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4 due to absence of quantified AI-attributable spend beyond acquisition prices.
Acquisition figures ($115M, $82M) are for broader technology acquisitions not exclusively AI-attributable.
ai_narrative_concreteness scored 4 (not 5) because no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) are provided for deployed AI use cases.
Surging data center construction mention in CF outlook is attributed to external market demand, not Deere's own AI investment.
